name: rvv-scalar-dispatch-bundle-abi-coherence
title: RVV scalar dispatch bundle ABI coherence
description: Validate and carry IR-backed runtime ABI and mem-window contracts through RVV+scalar dispatch export, bundle records, and generated artifacts.
creator: codex
notes: Implemented target-local RVV+scalar dispatch child ABI preflight for selected dispatch case/fallback routes, preserved standalone RVV route behavior, added i64 stale child ABI and pointer metadata negatives, and verified focused lit/C++ plus check-tianchenrv 192/192.
